message:
Fix Sources list scroll tracking to keep selection visible

Add `last_sources_visible_rows` field to track the rendered row count of
the Sources pane, and introduce `ensure_sources_selection_visible()` to
clamp the scroll offset whenever the selection moves outside the visible
window.  This prevents the selected source from scrolling out of view
when navigating with keyboard arrows in a list longer than the viewport.

Also mark a source item as errored (busy=false, error message) when a
sync response references a source name that no longer exists in config,
giving the user visible feedback instead of silently dropping the event.

Includes a test that exercises upward/downward scrolling plus wrap-around
back to the top.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
